{{CargoRelic
|name=Cairoo Excellence Cert.
|class_id=20958
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The award, given only to the most promising and outstanding enterprises under Cairoo, is designed to motivate every dream-driven entrepreneur to climb the peaks of business. Cairoo itself crafted this certificate with meticulous workmanship and sincere sentiment!
|fame=31
|art=13
|fth=15
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail RUSH +2<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail RUSH +4<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000<br> (Awakened)
}}
